title: Event payload: run_started (v0.1)
description: Payload shape for run_started events. Carried inside the envelope's 'payload' field. Marks the beginning of an agent run.

runId.description: Unique identifier for this run. All events relating to the same run (tool_call, tool_result, run_completed, ...) MUST carry this exact value in their payloads where applicable.

agentRef.description: agentId of the agent performing this run. SHOULD correspond to the agentId in a project.agent.registered event (in this Pack or resolvable elsewhere).

objective.description: What the agent was asked to accomplish. Free text or structured object — open shape, no validation beyond presence and being string-or-object. Implementers SHOULD provide a human-readable rendering even if the canonical form is structured.

initiator.description: Who or what triggered the run. Open shape. Typical fields: 'type' (e.g. user, agent, schedule, api), 'id', 'display'. Validators MUST NOT reject unknown fields here.

initialInput.description: The starting input to the run (prompt, parameters, structured request). Open shape, any JSON type. MAY be omitted for runs whose input is recorded out-of-band — in that case SHOULD reference the out-of-band record via a contextEvent or via 'initiator'.

runtime.description: Informational metadata about the runtime environment. Typical fields: 'model', 'modelVersion', 'orchestrator', 'orchestratorVersion', 'host'. Open shape.

correlationId.description: Cross-system trace identifier (e.g. an OpenTelemetry trace ID or a request ID). Free-form string; no format constraint.
